title: ThinkNode M6: identify LoRa/GPS chips and pin mapping
description: Before board definition: (1) Check ELECROW docs/schematic for LoRa chip (SX1262 vs LR1110), (2) Identify GPS chip, (3) Find pin mapping in Meshtastic variants/ or by inspection, (4) Check solar/battery monitoring interface (I2C fuel gauge? ADC?). Blocks all other M6 work.
notes: Identified from Meshtastic variant/nrf52840/ELECROW-ThinkNode-M6/variant.h and boards/ThinkNode-M6.json: LoRa=SX1262 (CS=P1.12, DIO1=P1.6, BUSY=P1.11, RESET=P1.10, DIO2=RF-SW, TCXO=3.3V); GPS=L76K (EN=P0.6, UART0.2/0.3 TX/RX, PPS=P0.31, REINIT=P0.29, STANDBY=P0.30); Battery=ADC P0.28 w/ ctrl P0.11, ADC_MULTIPLIER=1.75, OCV table; Solar charger detect P0.15, HAS_SOLAR; RTC PCF8563@0x51; QSPI flash. Not LR1110 → unblocks iw00. Pin mapping now available for board DTS. See ~/GIT/meshtastic-firmware for full variant.h. Updated parent epic.
